message:
fix: address round 3 review issues across 6 areas

Critical fixes:
- Race iterator.next() against AbortSignal in streaming to prevent
  leaked HTTP connections on abort (fire-and-forget iterator.return()
  when signal is already aborted to avoid hanging on stuck generators)
- Propagate enableStreaming to child agents in executeDelegation
- Emit session_end with success:false when LLM throws non-abort error

Important fixes:
- Handle error EventKind in buildAgentStats (reset to idle)
- Wire enableStreaming:true from factory.ts and agent-process.ts
- Throw explicit error when stream finish event lacks response
- Replace setTimeout-based abort tests with barrier/rendezvous pattern
- Add tests for out-of-order events in buildAgentStats
- Reset token counts on session_end in buildAgentStats
- Add renderEvent tests for llm_start, llm_chunk, llm_end

Suggestion fixes:
- Type stateLabels as Record<AgentState, string>
- Add resetTimestamps() in beforeEach to prevent counter leak
- Replace div with span inside button for valid HTML
- Hide idle label for completed agents with token activity
- Add reasoning_delta streaming test coverage

Test infrastructure:
- Update VCR replay to wrap complete recordings as minimal streams
- Convert all inline mock clients to use buildMockClient helper
  for consistent stream/complete behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
